data-engineer.description: Primary AI Data Engineer agent for building data pipelines, agents, and analytics.

reviewer.description: Code review specialist — checks for quality, security, and best practices.

orchestrator.description: Orchestrator agent — decomposes workflows into DAGs, dispatches to worker agents, aggregates results.

data-pipeline.description: Data pipeline worker — ETL/ELT, query execution, file ingestion, data transformation, validation.

analytics.description: Analytics worker — aggregations, anomaly detection, reporting, dashboard generation.

code-gen.description: Code generation worker — dbt models, pipeline code, SQL generation, scaffolding.

deploy.description: Deploy the project — run docker-compose up, sync deps, and start services.
deploy.prompt: Start the full infrastructure: run docker-compose -f E:/projects/infra/docker-compose.yml up -d, then uv sync, and verify services are healthy.

test.description: Run the full test suite with pytest and linting.
test.prompt: Run uv run pytest tests/ -v and uv run ruff check .

start-infra.description: Start the Silver Infrastructure (Docker services + global harness).
